message:
fix: CTE with OR filterGroups + outer OR not inlined (AND→OR corruption)

When both a CTE and the outer query have OR-decomposed filterGroups,
flat-concatenating them turned `(A OR B) AND (C OR D)` into
`A OR B OR C OR D`. Now prevents inlining in this case.

CTE with filterGroups + outer AND-only filters still inlines correctly.
